user.title: Set up Telink Manager
user.description:
This adds the **Telink Manager** panel to the sidebar. From there you can scan, read and configure PVVX/ATC firmware Telink BLE thermometers over your Home Assistant Bluetooth proxies.

No configuration is required — select **Submit** to add it.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Telink Manager is already set up. Only one instance is needed.
